title: Recover Python secure CoAP ordering
description: Recover atomic request-token consumption, EDHOC TOFU-before-context publication, fail-closed config writes, SOS type validation, and bounded sent-message retention.
acceptance_criteria: Tokens consume exactly once under concurrency; TOFU mismatch stores no context; config writes default deny; malformed SOS rejects; retention is bounded; focused tests, Ruff, mypy, and three reviews pass.
